name: know
description: Your team's shared brain in Claude Code — recall durable team/project facts, save new ones, and surface & resolve contradictions, with optional passive capture. Bundles the MCP connector + /know:* commands; configure it with your personal connector URL (the URL is the credential).

brain_mcp_url.title: Brain connector URL
brain_mcp_url.description: Your full know connector URL (ask your brain admin), including your name — e.g. https://your-brain-host/mcp/<secret>/<your-name>/ . The URL IS the credential; treat it like a password.
